statement.markdown: Given a string containing a sequence of parentheses, brackets, and curly braces, check whether the expression is balanced. An expression is balanced if every opening parenthesis or bracket has a corresponding closing parenthesis or bracket of the correct type, and vice versa.
statement.inputFormat: Input is a string of characters containing parentheses, brackets, and curly braces.
statement.outputFormat: The output should be a boolean indicating whether the input expression is balanced.
statement.notes: This problem can be solved by using a stack data structure to keep track of the opening parentheses and brackets encountered in the input string.
